programme.title: Movie: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: Lorena’s journey from a wide-eyed, immigrant bride to a battered wife, and an unlikely media sensation, with her ultimately emerging as a strong, thoughtful woman who has devoted her life to advocating for other abused women.

programme.title: Movie: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: A woman tries to escape her abusive husband by staging her death and moving away.

programme.title: Movie: Abducted: The Mary Stauffer Story
programme.desc: Following the abduction of high school teacher and her young daughter by her obsessed former student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Sniper's Trail
programme.desc: Exploring the Beltway sniper attacks, a shooting spree that left 10 people dead in the Washington D.C. area over the course of just three weeks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Winter's Warning
programme.desc: Team Turin races to smash their 400-ounce season goal in Hummocks gold. But the increasing amounts of heavy black sand, early snow and pressure from the local community threaten to derail their operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: With bonus features and added scenes: Dave tracks down the son of an old-timer for a lead that could send the team over the top.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Million Dollar Gamble
programme.desc: Dave makes a dramatic pitch to return to Lynx Creek for a shot at the team's first-ever million-dollar season. But Casey must find gold fast as Jason is hit with a bombshell that could end their Arizona adventure before it begins.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Naked and Unafraid
programme.desc: Shawn pulls an all-nighter with the revamped Myrtle. The Kellys' season might be saved with a little help. Emily acts quick in a dangerous situation. Vernon hopes hiring Steve again won't be a mistake. Zeke enlists his brother to get them on gold.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: What Would Phil Harris Do?
programme.desc: With the Bairdi fishery open for the first time in years, Josh and John on the Time Bandit reopen the Phil Harris playbook and ask Casey and Sig to help tank the fleetwide quota. Wild Bill bets on Nick McGlashan to turn the tide for the Summer Bay.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Know Your Enemy

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Drag Boat Destruction
programme.desc: A dragboat breaks apart at 180 miles per hour. An F3 tornado destroys a town. A DC-7 is deliberately crashed. A massive explosion occurs on the roof of a dorm, and a sprint car crashes at 120 miles per hour.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Peacock Bass Challenge
programme.desc: The Martin Family is peacock bass fishing.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: SUV Crash, F5 Tornado
programme.desc: A SUV hits a convenience store; a fire sets off a massive blast; a biker crashes.

programme.title: Sport Fishing Television: Stars and Stripers
programme.desc: Captain Jamie Simmons targets the stiped bass in Cape Cod.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Gas Explosion, Jet Engine
programme.desc: A gas station explodes; dozens of twisters take aim at three states and a landmark.

programme.title: Uncharted Waters with Peter Miller: Bahamas, Part 2
programme.desc: Peter searches for bonefish in the Bahamas.

programme.title: The RVers: 3.04
programme.desc: Learn about electrical system overhaul and fire and ice.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Trick Line and Sinker
programme.desc: Justin and Travis look back at previous trips and share why they use a variety of tackle.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Carving Out a Life
programme.desc: In New Freeport, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save a cabin with incredible stone work, and the guys learn pioneer stone techniques from a local expert. Later, Mark visits two incredible restorations and Alex makes a barnwood wedding gift.

programme.title: Pushing the Line: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Friends and rivals try to walk thin, nylon ropes stretched 500 feet in the air. On the line, the daredevils push each other to try increasingly dangerous stunts and break records. Off the line, who's hooking up and who's breaking up adds more tension.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Kentucky Home
programme.desc: The crew visits Johnny Jett's hometown of Morehead, KY, to save an old barn, and Mark challenges the two junior members of the team to take down a few logs. Johnny takes the guys to see an old grist mill that's close to his favourite covered bridge.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Five-Barn Farm
programme.desc: The guys salvage five tobacco barns on one farm in Alton, Virginia, while Mark hunts for even more barns in Pennsylvania. Mark also visits an incredible finished home made of two cabins combined with a salt box addition.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaintop Retreat
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Eagle Rock, Virginia, to build a spectacular dogtrot cabin in the Blue Ridge Mountains. Tim Rose travels to Halifax, Virginia, to see the finished log cabin they built five years earlier at the Springfield Distillery.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A Million Little Things
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders have a million things to do on the Boneyard. As they prep two cabins and complete an endless list of tasks, Sherman works with blacksmith Glen Bryant to create a branding iron, and Mark Bowe visits one of the first cabins he built.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Human Resources
programme.desc: After welcoming a new team member, the guys build a custom timber frame and a new log cabin. Then, Mark Bowe visits a West Virginia factory that creates wooden barrels, and Alex Webb creates a hall table using reclaimed flooring from an old barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Out of this World
programme.desc: Down in Virginia, the Barnwood Builders recreate an 18th-century log chapel and save an old barn using modern equipment that looks like it came from outer space. They build a bench with a chainsaw artist, and Johnny Jett learns to play golf.

programme.title: Pushing the Line: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Friends and rivals try to walk thin, nylon ropes stretched 500 feet in the air. On the line, the daredevils push each other to try increasingly dangerous stunts and break records. Off the line, who's hooking up and who's breaking up adds more tension.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Inspiration
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Walton, WV, to save the barn that inspired Mark Bowe to start his business 25 years ago. The guys find some fun treasures, Sherman makes a special gift and Alex visits a workshop that makes some of the finest pipe organs.

programme.desc: Bonnie has an unexpected reaction when she learns that Adam’s bar is doing well. Also, Christy and Tammy go on a double date.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Pasadena
programme.desc: Sheldon visits CalTech for the very first time. Also, Georgie is furious when Mary listens in on a phone call with his girlfriend, and Meemaw tries to cheer up a jealous Missy.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: An Academic Crime and a More Romantic Taco Bell
programme.desc: Dr. Sturgis is furious when Sheldon accuses him of plagiarism. Mary sets out to find a 'girl trophy' for Missy’s end-of-season baseball ceremony, and Georgie has an awkward run-in with Veronica while on a date with his new girlfriend, Jana.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Couple Bruised Ribs and a Cereal Box Ghost Detector
programme.desc: When George Sr. accidentally lands the school librarian, Ms. Hutchins, in the hospital, the Cooper family must nurse her back to health.

programme.title: Full House: The Legend of Ranger Joe
programme.desc: Ranger Roy announces his retirement on Danny's show and Joey tries out for the position.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Valentine's Day/ The Paper
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day and SpongeBob shows that one man's trash can be another's treasure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mutiny on the Krusty/ The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers need Krabs to lead them home. Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Naughty Nautical Neighbors/ Boating School
programme.desc: Squidward makes Spongebob and Patrick think they're no longer friends; Boating exams.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBob's Under Years: Sugar-Squeeze!/ Tag, You're It
programme.desc: The adventures of 10-year old SpongeBob at Mr. Krabs' summer camp, Kamp Koral.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutty Nieces/ Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's three nieces. SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge/ Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Doodle Dimension/ Moving Bubble Bass
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternate dimension where anything they draw comes to life. SpongeBob and Patrick help Bubble Bass move out of his mother's basement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Slammer/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: When Plankton breaks the law, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: FarmerBob/ Gary and Spot

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snooze You Lose/ Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam’s big day is finally here and nothing can ruin it, until nothing turns into a whole lot of somethings and puts wedding planner extraordinaire Pepper Saltzman to the test. Jay and Gloria host the Tuckers. Phil squeezes in an eye procedure.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding day chaos continues as the entire party shifts from one contingency plan to another. Guests start to get testy, Mitchell and Cameron are feeling discouraged and poor Claire shows physical wear and tear.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Long Honeymoon
programme.desc: This summer has been exceptionally blissful in the Dunphy house. Alex is away on a humanitarian trip and the rest of the family is getting along swimmingly, but when Alex comes home, there is an immediate shift in mood.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do Not Push
programme.desc: It's Jay and Gloria's anniversary and they can't seem to get on the same page on what kind of gift to give; sentimental or expensive. And, the Dunphys head to Caltech for Alex's college tour.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cold
programme.desc: Phil is putting together Mitch and Cam's wedding video for a special family screening, but when the footage reveals that he is responsible for a horrible cold that has plagued the family, he must do some creative editing.

programme.title: Modern Family: Marco Polo
programme.desc: The Dunphys move into a cramped hotel room while their house is getting treated for mold, which Phil sees as an opportunity to spend some quality time together, but Claire and the kids are less than enthused.

programme.title: Modern Family: Won't You Be Our Neighbor
programme.desc: Phil is selling the house next door and he and Claire are excited by the prospect of having wonderful new neighbours, but that quickly turns into panic when a loud and obnoxious couple come to look at the house.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween 3: AwesomeLand
programme.desc: Even though Halloween is Claire's holiday, she allows Phil to take over this year so instead of her usual fright-fest theme, he decides to turn the house into AwesomeLand.

programme.title: Modern Family: Queer Eyes, Full Hearts
programme.desc: Phil and Claire don't know if they should be happy or concerned that Haley and Andy are spending a lot of time together, however, they soon find things are not what they appear.

programme.title: Modern Family: Three Turkeys
programme.desc: Phil is cooking Thanksgiving dinner this year with Luke as his sous chef, but Claire has no confidence in them and prepares a secret turkey of her own as backup.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers in the Night
programme.desc: When Alex tells Phil and Claire she has a boyfriend, they worry they’ve put too much pressure on her and has made up an imaginary boyfriend.

programme.title: Modern Family: Haley's 21st Birthday
programme.desc: Haley's turning 21 and the family is taking her to a bar to celebrate. Claire really wants Haley to start seeing her as a friend rather than her uptight mom, and Mitch and Cam make the sad realization that they may not be as cool as they thought.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Day We Almost Died
programme.desc: While driving out to get breakfast, the Dunphys including Manny have a near death experience causing everyone to reevaluate their lives.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Big Guns
programme.desc: Claire is furious about neighbours Ronnie and Amber's eye-sore of a boat on their front lawn and it soon becomes an all-out war when Phil calls in the 'big guns' as back up.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Sex Buddy
programme.desc: Charlotte double-books dates; Carrie dates her buddy; Samantha hears her neighbours.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Shortcomings
programme.desc: Miranda dates a divorced man and Carrie dates a storywriter's extended family.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Was It Good for You?
programme.desc: Carrie dates an alcoholic and wonders if she's a substitute for beer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Twenty-Something Girls vs. Thirty-Something Women
programme.desc: Samantha's assistant steals her Rolodex and throws a party; Charlotte dates a 26-year-old.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ex and the City
programme.desc: Carrie learns that Big is engaged; Charlotte gets reacquainted with an equine friend.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Samantha hooks-up with a fireman only to have the flames put out; Charlotte dates a bully.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Politically Erect
programme.desc: Charlotte plans to find a husband; Carrie's politician boyfriend has a surprising request.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Attack of the 5'10" Woman
programme.desc: Carrie sees Big's wedding announcement; Charlotte struggles with her body image.

programme.title: Reunion Road Trip: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at the new series, 'Reunion Road Trip'.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Modern Family: Rash Decisions
programme.desc: Phil is starting to feel the teenage cold shoulder from Luke, and with Andy hanging around a lot recently as his apprentice, he easily steps in as his new right hand man.

programme.title: Modern Family: Valentine's Day 4: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Jay goes from feeling disappointed to scared when Gloria's visiting sister, Sonia, becomes a large deterrence for a romantic evening with Gloria. Then, Mitchell and Cameron get themselves in a very precarious situation with their good friend, Anders.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: After a long reunion weekend with Phil's old cheer buddies, Claire jumps at the chance to snag the only first-class seat left on the return flight home, leaving Phil in coach. Both have completely opposite experiences to what they were expecting.

programme.title: Modern Family: Connection Lost
programme.desc: Claire's computer becomes the hub of all the family's activities when she gets stuck at the airport and is desperate to reach Haley after a big fight.

programme.title: Modern Family: Closet? You'll Love It!
programme.desc: A peeping-Tom in the neighbourhood keeps using a drone to spy on Gloria sun-bathing, so Phil, Luke and Manny make it their mission to take it down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring Break
programme.desc: Claire does some spring cleaning while Phil struggles with not being a spring chicken when Luke starts outperforming him. Haley takes Alex to a music festival to take her mind off college. Gloria and Jay challenge one another to give up soaps and cigars.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grill, Interrupted
programme.desc: Jay's birthday brings everyone together and Phil is beside himself over the super cool gift he got Jay, a high-tech outdoor grill. Claire and Mitch decide they will 'offer' to pay back the money Jay loaned them ages ago.

programme.title: Modern Family: Knock 'Em Down
programme.desc: Jay agrees to sub in on Cam's bowling team for the finals. Unfortunately Cam was not fully upfront about it being an all gay league, which puts Jay in a precarious position.

programme.title: Modern Family: Integrity
programme.desc: Phil and Jay run an errand together to pick up Lily's hand-me-down princess castle for Joe. However, both are in a mood because Phil is upset that Claire won't let him buy a video game console and Jay thinks Gloria is letting Joe play with girlie items.

programme.title: Modern Family: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Alex's worst nightmare is realized when she gets news that she has to share the Valedictorian title with her number one competitor, Sunjay.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Goin' Big and Bringin' Home
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri combine cooking at home and great restaurant food with recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. The menu includes a stromboli from Wyoming and seafood stew from a classic Georgia diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: College-Town Champs
programme.desc: Guy visits Columbus, Ohio for pierogies and a barbeque truck and Boulder, Colorado for noodles and chicken from a Thai restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian, Thai and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a righteous time revisiting joints offering everything from pie to Thai. In Honolulu, a family spot going strong with their specialties straight out of Thailand.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Sandwiches To Stroganoff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of hearty meals on this trip. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mash-up pilin' up smoked meat sensations. Plus a funky joint making big-time empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up to Barcelona
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's crossing the Atlantic to take a big bite out of Barcelona, Spain. He's diving in to the many different cuisines the city has to offer, from a homey spot serving Galician-style octopus and soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coming Together in Cali
programme.desc: For this trip, Guy Fieri zeroes in on Chico, California, celebrating the town's food scene as residents and restaurant owners recover from ravaging fires that rocked the area.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: All Over the Menu
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and Hunter are joined by DDD alums via video chat to cook up a menu of chicken and biscuits out of Brooklyn and off-the-hook Jamaican oxtail and wings from Cincinnati. Plus, it's a whole new kind of crab cake straight out of Baltimore.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From the Heart
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some spots putting their heart and soul into everything they do. In Carlsbad, Calif., a family-owned Italian joint is staying true to a long-standing ravioli recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy visits Alamaba for homemade gumbo and a super spicy crawfish boil.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Perfect Pastry
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares tips and ideas for cooking with sweet, savory and even store-bought pastry. She starts with her foolproof sweet pastry dough for a showstopping French fig tart. She uses a shortcut to make spinach in puff pastry.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Salads For Four Seasons
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her pro tips for sensational salads for every season. For an all-in-one spring dinner, her crispy mustard chicken and frisee salad is unbeatable, and tarragon shrimp salad is perfect for an easy and delicious summer lunch.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Sizzling Summer
programme.desc: The Kitchen is kicking off summer with a hot menu, starting with Sunny Anderson's sizzling summer burger and Jeff Mauro's side dish, double potato salad with pesto.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Italian Feast on Fire
programme.desc: Michael Symon creates an entire Italian feast over coals on the grill, starting with fettuccine with smoked tomato sauce. His wife, Liz, mixes up creamy ricotta, lemon and herbs for stuffed squash blossoms, and they finish with lemon upside-down cake.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Nothing Beats Barbecue Chicken
programme.desc: Michael grills up a feast of summertime staples, starting with barbecue chicken slathered in a Kansas City-style sauce. Then he gives coleslaw a twist by adding pickles, mint leaves and poppy seed while Liz makes a Kentucky mule cocktail.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Film Crew Takeout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks food for her kid crew to take home after a busy day of filming. She makes Alex's veggie packed burritos, Mauricio's tortilla soup, Paige's s'mores brownies and Stu's baked BBQ ribs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Father and Daughter
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is busy working on a mom-made lunch for her father-daughter duo on the farm.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Hot Dogs, New Tricks
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro shares all the twists, turns and new takes on the beloved standby, the hot dog, and brings out his recipe for hot dog curly fries with dippers. Guest chef Mary Giuliani also makes her cacio e pepe and carbonara versions.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Bust Out the Stretchy Pants
programme.desc: Michael Symon flexes his grilling muscles once again by showing that any dish made inside can be made just as well outside on the grill.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Restaurant Recreations
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's chef friends recreate some restaurant favorites. Eric Greenspan stirs a ruby red and tarragon paloma, Antonia Lofaso makes Vietnamese spring rolls, Marc Murphy prepares chicken and merguez tagine, and Crista Luedtke grills chili tri-tip.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Extreme Eats
programme.desc: Food Paradise is going to extremes with the best in big food with even bigger flavour. Whether it's a Bloody Mary garnished with baby back ribs, mozzarella sticks and more or a palatial pizza made of chicken Parmesan, sometimes too much is not enough!

programme.title: Food Paradise: Bang for Your Buck
programme.desc: Frugal foodies rejoice! From huge servings of hot chicken and supersized subs to one-of-a-kind gourmet pizza and some of the biggest burgers around, you always get a bang for your buck at these Food Paradise finds.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Seafood- Eat Food!
programme.desc: From over-the-top surf-and-turf sandwiches to fresh takes on Southern standbys, we're tasting seafood dishes that are making waves from the bay to the bayou!

programme.title: Food Paradise: Off the Beaten Q
programme.desc: There are a lot of barbecue purists out there, but Food Paradise is going off the beaten path to find folks who are willing to go beyond the classics with everything from a trio of Southern, Korean and Mexican tacos.

programme.title: Movie: Paul
programme.desc: Two British comic book geeks traveling across the United States encounter aliens outside of Area 51.

programme.title: Movie: The Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Five friends get more than they bargained for while visiting a remote cabin in the woods.

programme.title: Movie: Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Scientists looking to cure Alzheimer's perform experiments on sharks in the open ocean. They are forced to fight for their lives when the experiment goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: 'Show-Me' State Dream Home
programme.desc: After a $3 million scratcher win, Brandon, Hannah and baby daughter, Naomi, can finally move from their one-bedroom rental to a beautiful family dream home in Missouri.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Virginia Beach Forever
programme.desc: After serving in the U.S. Air Force for six years, a couple decides to leave Arizona and find their dream home in the military-friendly town of Virginia Beach, Virginia. A life-changing $100,000 settlement is used for a down payment.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Hero's Reward
programme.desc: After lady luck rewards a retired firefighter for a lifetime of service with a big win, dream home hunter David Bromstad helps him search for the perfect bachelor pad in the Lakeland region of Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: First-Time Forever Home
programme.desc: David Bromstad heads to Dallas, Texas, to meet a couple who won the lottery in life and love! David has to be on his A-game because between this pair's construction and inspection experience, they really know what to look for in their forever dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: League City Limits
programme.desc: A couple's $1 million win is the perfect chance to ditch their small home and have plenty of space for their teenagers to spread out.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: So Young, So Rich
programme.desc: In North Carolina, David helps his youngest winner yet put her $390,000 towards buying a home to share with her mom and sister. There aren't many 22-year-olds with a property portfolio, so David is thrilled to find a home with pretty livestreaming spaces.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Million-Dollar Wonderland
programme.desc: After winning big on a scratch-off, a couple is all smiles as they hunt for their dream home near Canton, Ohio. David braves the cold to help them find the perfect compromise between city and country living in a snow-covered winter wonderland adventure.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Mansion for Mom
programme.desc: A man's hard work paid off when he won $7 million after playing the same set of numbers for three years. Instead of buying a home for himself, he hopes David can help him find a Texas mansion for his mom where she can enjoy her twilight years.

programme.title: Frozen in Time: The 1961 House
programme.desc: Maureen and Dan take on a couple's 1961 home that acts as a time capsule with its period furnishings. The view and hilltop inspire them to create a design plan that honors the homeowner's father while making the couple feel like it's their own house.

programme.title: Frozen in Time: The 1958 House
programme.desc: A couple buys her grandparents' home and although she wants to update the 1958 property, childhood memories are making it difficult for her to let go. Maureen and Dan help by showing her what can be restored to its former glory and what should be trashed.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The House Always Wins
programme.desc: A professional poker player with a total winning pot of $4 million is ready to go 'all in' on a huge family home along Philadelphia's Main Line area.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: On the Throne
programme.desc: Billy won a million dollars on a scratch-off and changed his family's life, no longer living paycheck to paycheck. Now, they need help to find a forever home in Knoxville, TN, that fits their $180,000 budget.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Delaware Dream Home
programme.desc: A Staten Island couple's dream of trading their fast-paced life for quiet, relaxed Bethany Beach, Delaware, becomes a reality after they win a million dollars. David helps them find their forever home.

programme.desc: A single mom won $3 million on the lottery and wants more space after sharing an apartment with her three growing girls. With four ladies to please, David Bromstad has his hands full finding a home with rooms for everyone and space to spread out.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Strike it Rich
programme.desc: Josh goes panning for gold in a quest to unearth the West's greatest treasure. Eustache fights to save his land. Jason returns to the forge, putting his injured hand to the test. Jake battles steep terrain. Kidd and Harry risk getting crushed.

programme.title: Mountain Men: The Big Reckoning

programme.title: Mountain Men: Hunt to Survive

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Ailsa Jackson and Michael Walker
programme.desc: When the wife of an Army medic is discovered murdered in her Hawaii home, the investigation reveals a sordid tale of secrets, lies, and a twisted romance that captured headlines across the country.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Mark Spotz and Christina Noland
programme.desc: A horrific killing spree leads Pennsylvania investigators on the hunt for two young lovers willing to do whatever it takes to evade the law.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Kyle Navin and Jennifer Valiente
programme.desc: The sudden disappearance of a wealthy couple rattles their small town and launches an investigation that exposes a web of deception, greed, and a blood-soaked betrayal.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: When a beloved elderly woman is viciously murdered, detectives discover a chilling connection to another unsolved murder. The trail points to someone from her past and investigators race to hunt the killer down before they can strike again.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: The Will to Kill
programme.desc: A retired farmer thinks he's struck gold after natural gas is found on his property. When he’s found dead and a family feud breaks out over his estate, detectives uncover a tale of lies, deceit and manipulation orchestrated by someone close to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on Hot Springs Drive
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a home invasion. Then, her best friend and neighbor is shot the following night. Investigators unearth disturbing secrets that suggest the cases may be linked.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jack Jessee was a family man who didn't seem to have an enemy in the world, up until the night he was killed. The case went cold but a relentless detective was determined to catch Jack's killer.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Runaway Murderer
programme.desc: A glamorous 85-year-old millionaire is found brutally stabbed in her basement, sending police on an international investigation that unearths devilish secrets, double lives and a killer no one saw coming whose tricks wouldn’t stop even after their arrest.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Finger of Suspicion
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is killed in her own bedroom and the evidence appears to point a clear suspect, but police soon discover not everything is as it seems. It takes 30 years and stunning new evidence to reveal a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Second Chance to Kill
programme.desc: Police hunting the killer of a beloved grandfather believe his missing truck holds the key to the case. After hunting down suspect after suspect, local PD found a killer close to home, wielding a shocking kill weapon in a story of sickening betrayal.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Twisted Attraction
programme.desc: When a young woman who was just starting out in life is found assaulted and stabbed to death in her boyfriend's home, detectives work tirelessly to uncover a killer who had previously been above suspicion, leaving the town and police force stunned.

programme.title: Dateline: Captured
programme.desc: Amanda Lindhout was a freelance journalist who was kidnapped in Somalia and held in captivity for 15 months. This is the story of how she survived the ordeal and how her mother worked tirelessly to secure her release.

programme.title: Dateline: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo
programme.desc: Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan comes out of the shadows to detail his search for El Chapo with never-before-seen videos and photos of the hunt for the notorious drug lord.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Silhouette
programme.desc: Real-life mysteries. Investigative reporting. Justice.

programme.title: Catching a Serial Killer: Bruce McArthur
programme.desc: Bruce McArthur was many things; friend, grandfather, mall Santa, landscaper, and a ruthless serial killer who buried body parts in the yards of his posh clientele. This is the true story of the race to catch Toronto's most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Rifkin on Rifkin: Private Confessions of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Through newly revealed interviews from Attica Correctional Facility, New York's most prolific serial killer, Joel Rifkin, reveals exclusive insights into the mind of a monster.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: Crystal Rogers' car is abandoned in Bardstown, KY, the mother of 5 vanished. A year later her father is shot dead while searching for her. We discover there are multiple cases in a small town shrouded in secrets, and haunted by unsolved killings.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: The Search Continues
programme.desc: The brother of Crystal's boyfriend, Nick Houck, a Bardstown Police Officer is grilled by the FBI. Stephanie and Dwayne follow a search of a lake where cadaver dogs pick up a scent. On the Bluegrass Parkway the scene of a deadly ambush is explored.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Cold And Calculating
programme.desc: An FBI profiler offers chilling insights on a potential killer. Family members of Bardstown's other victims speak. A mysterious white car is possibly linked to Crystal's disappearance.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: After a failed mission results in highly dangerous plutonium falling into enemy hands, IMF agent Ethan Hunt finds his loyalty questioned. Pursued by both his former allies and enemy assassins, he fights to clean up his mess and fulfill the mission.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sex, Pies and Idiot-Scrapes
programme.desc: Homer is sent to jail after a haphazard, booze-free brawl at the Springfield St. Patrick's Day parade. When he goes to get his bail bond, Homer meets Lucky Jim and Wolf the Bounty Hunter and decides to try his own hand at the lucrative profession.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lost Verizon
programme.desc: Bart finds Dennis Leary's cell phone and uses it to make prank phone calls all over the world. When Marge finds out, she and Leary devise a plan to activate a GPS system and track Bart's every move.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Double Double Boy in Trouble
programme.desc: Bart meets his exact look-alike, Simon Woosterfield, who happens to be a member of the richest family in Springfield. When the boys decide to switch places, Bart learns that his wealthy 'siblings' are plotting his demise so they can get his inheritance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangerous Curves
programme.desc: When the Simpson family takes a road trip to a cabin in the woods, a series of flashbacks depict Homer and Marge's blissful courtship and their early, married years.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mypods and Boomsticks
programme.desc: Bart befriends a Muslim boy, Bashir, but Homer becomes suspicious. After insulting the family and snooping around their personal business, Homer believes the family is involved in orchestrating a terrorist plot to blow up the local mall.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Burns and the Bees
programme.desc: Lisa tries to save the endangered Springfield bee population from Mr. Burns and his new sports arena. Homer attempts to help the quickly diminishing bee population by mating the Springfield bees with Africanized bees, creating a fiasco.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Take My Life, Please
programme.desc: When Mayor Quimby inducts Vance Connor into the Springfield Walk of Fame, Homer recounts how he ran against Vance for class president in high school and lost. A magical tomato sauce reveals what Homer's life could have been if he had won.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How the Test Was Won
programme.desc: After learning that Bart received a perfect score on a practice assessment test, Lisa freezes up when it comes time for her to take the exam. Meanwhile, Homer must avoid accidents at all costs when he is late with an insurance payment.

programme.title: The Simpsons: No Loan Again, Naturally
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge's mortgage skyrockets and they are forced to put their house up for sale, Flanders does a good deed by outbidding Mr. Burns and purchasing the property. But Homer's accusations soon cause their 'landlord' to threaten eviction.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Maggie Gone
programme.desc: When Homer leaves Maggie on the doorstep of a convent to keep her safe while rescuing Santa's Little Helper, the nuns at the convent take Maggie in. Lisa comes up with a plan to infiltrate the convent and rescue Maggie.

programme.title: The Simpsons: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: The Simpson family travels to Ireland so Grandpa can have one last pint at his beloved O'Flanagan's Pub in Dunkilderry. After a few spirits, Homer and Grandpa buy the establishment from the owner and try to bring it back to life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Wedding for Disaster
programme.desc: When their marriage turns out to be invalid, Homer asks Marge for a re-do on their 'I do's'. But when Homer mysteriously disappears just before the wedding, Bart and Lisa go searching for answers.

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode

programme.desc: A man who's tired of his dead-end life and humiliating job signs up for night school so that he can pass the GED exam and finally be a high school graduate, but with an eclectic group of students the teacher turns to unconventional ways of teaching.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Lonely Among Us
programme.desc: While transporting delegates, the Enterprise is affected by a strange entity.

programme.title: Movie: Young Guns
programme.desc: Six gunmen become fugitives from the law after ambushing their employer's murderers.

programme.title: Movie: Young Guns II
programme.desc: Billy the Kid and the gang head for Old Mexico with a band of lawmen in pursuit.

programme.title: Movie: Young Guns
programme.desc: Six gunmen become fugitives from the law after ambushing their employer's murderers.

programme.title: Movie: Young Guns II
programme.desc: Billy the Kid and the gang head for Old Mexico with a band of lawmen in pursuit.

programme.title: Moon Landing
programme.desc: High-quality NASA footage and extensive broadcasts bring the very first moon landing back into life.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Our cameras follow a first-time grizzly mum named Parsnip, and her cub Pushki.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Alaska's famous salmon run arrives, and Parsnip and Puski return to feed, but face fierce competition.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Tiger Shark Terror
programme.desc: Professional shark diver Eli Martinez and scientist Matthew Smukall plunge into the nighttime world of Tiger Beach to investigate whether shark behavior changes once the sun goes down.

programme.title: Sharks vs. Dolphins: Blood Battle
programme.desc: There’s a war being waged beneath the waves: sharks versus dolphins.

programme.title: United Sharks of America: Shark Bite Capitals
programme.desc: American beaches are under attack…by sharks. In the last 10 years the number of sightings and attacks has grown.

programme.title: What the Shark?
programme.desc: What the Shark? dives deep into the environments where adaptation is critical to survival.

programme.title: Sharks of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle’s greatest wonder may be the secret breeding grounds of tiger sharks.

programme.title: Raging Bull Shark
programme.desc: The bull shark is here to prove that it is the new champion of the chomp.

programme.title: Man vs. Shark
programme.desc: Marine biologist attempts to get bitten by a deadly tiger shark and survive.

programme.title: Sharks of the Bermuda Triangle

programme.desc: Biker George Wegers plans to make the Bandidos the biggest, baddest outlaw club in America. But he doesn't anticipate Detective Al Jensen, a one-man anti-biker task force.

programme.title: Outlaw Bikers: Warlock War
programme.desc: In 1990, Warlocks National President Spike Ingrao recruits a new bunch of tough guys to help him take on his great rivals, the Outlaws. Ingrao thinks he's hooking up with serious criminals, but the new recruits are in fact undercover agents.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Doggie Delivery
programme.desc: Early spring in Nebraska brings new life and unpredictable veterinary challenges.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: That Old Farm Magic

programme.desc: The doctors treat an array of complicated cases that are way more than meets the eye.

programme.desc: In Nebraska, clients bring creatures great and small to Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder.

programme.title: Wizard of Paws: Lightning

programme.title: Wizard of Paws: Avery
programme.desc: Derrick tackles a prosthetics project for Avery, an energetic golden retriever with deformed paws.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Goose on the Loose
programme.desc: Dr. Hodges is in surgery when a baby goat in distress comes to the office.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Alpacapalooza
programme.desc: The doctors are busy taking care of the rural Georgia animal population.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Hump Day
programme.desc: Drs. Hodges and Ferguson see an unusual patient in Georgia: an unruly camel.

programme.title: Yeti or Not
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Evans, a veterinarian and explorer, is on a mission to sift fact from folklore and distil the plausible from the possible as he searches for a rational explanation for the mysterious Himalayan biped known as the Yeti.

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Relic That Sees the Future
programme.desc: A bizarre 3,000 year-old gold relic crafted with intricately designed cryptic patterns is believed to form a highly complex celestial code. Using advanced imaging technology, experts speculate that it could be an ancient device for predicting the future.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Treasure Scrolls
programme.desc: A bizarre find called Copper Scroll is one of the famous Dead Sea Scrolls, but it's unlike any of the others. This strange relic might hold clues to a long-lost treasure, and cutting-edge science may finally reveal answers to this billion-dollar mystery.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mysteries of the Alien World
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the strange and unexplained cases NASA has encountered.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Unexplained UFOs
programme.desc: Cameras capture mysterious aerial phenomenon as a low-flying object spins over an English home and unexplained lights slowly move across the skies of Ukraine; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate what may be actual evidence of otherworldly UFOs.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost Rider from Hell
programme.desc: Security cameras in an underground parking garage capture an empty car starting and moving as if driven by a ghost. Experts investigate and discover a sinister threat that might put any vehicle at risk.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Unexplained UFOs
programme.desc: Cameras capture mysterious aerial phenomenon as a low-flying object spins over an English home and unexplained lights slowly move across the skies of Ukraine; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate what may be actual evidence of otherworldly UFOs.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost Rider from Hell
programme.desc: Security cameras in an underground parking garage capture an empty car starting and moving as if driven by a ghost. Experts investigate and discover a sinister threat that might put any vehicle at risk.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Heist in the Holy Land
programme.desc: Ancient documents and legends suggest that the Ark of the Covenant may have been stolen by Roman legions and hidden in Rome. Now, a team of archaeologists explore mystery cults and ancient catacombs to uncover the truth behind this treasured artifact.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya Queens
programme.desc: The downfall of the powerful Maya city of Palenque continues to mystify archaeologists today; now, investigators gain rare access to explore lost tombs to reveal the truth behind this legendary city and the mystery behind its enigmatic queens.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Sumerian Gods
programme.desc: The ancient Sumerian city of Nippur is one of the richest archaeological sites on Earth, but decades of conflict have prevented its exploration. Now, experts gain rare access to finally uncover the mysteries behind the most sacred city of Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of Relic Mountain
programme.desc: The decapitated statues of Mount Nemrut and their eventual destruction have mystified experts for centuries. Now archaeologists decode cryptic inscriptions and use innovative geophysical analysis to reveal the mystery behind this ancient megastructure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Valley of Egypt's Queens
programme.desc: The Valley of the Queens is a vast necropolis concealing some of Egypt's most miraculous tombs and powerful women; now, investigators use cutting-edge tech to explore lost tunnels and uncover the enigmatic secrets behind these ancient pharaohs.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Persia
programme.desc: The sprawling city of Persepolis was capital to the first imperial civilization that conquered most of the known ancient world; now, experts use advanced forensic archaeology to reveal the secrets behind Persia's mysterious and dominating metropolis.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: A cold-blooded murder in a devout prayer group triggers a bizarre investigation in Oregon. As police uncover the unlikely culprits pulling the strings, chilling beliefs are brought to light.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Flowers on the Road
programme.desc: Two lost souls unlucky in love, Frank and Angelina Rodriguez, have found soulmates in each other. But in September 2000, a sudden death leads investigators to uncover a shocking tale of how one person's compulsion can turn into murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: One Way Ticket Out
programme.desc: When lifelong Long Islander Donna Bocklet announces she's leaving for Florida, it sends shock waves through her close circle of friends and family that ends in her brutal murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Flirting With Murder
programme.desc: When Trichele and Brian promise to stick it out for better or for worse, they have no idea how 'worse' things will get. Their passionate love easily flips to bitter hate when the parties, drinking, and recriminations escalate until one of them is dead.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: To Kiss or to Kill
programme.desc: April and Brad are happily married until her dreams of having a baby fall apart. Heartbroken, April turns to other men for consolation. One even moves in with the couple. But when Brad is ultimately replaced as the man of the house, everyone pays a price.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Nurses Lara Crockett and Ricardo Muscolino meet on the night shift. He's ambitious and sets about creating a rich life for them and she's happy to go along.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Serial Killer in the Making
programme.desc: Beloved wife and cardiac nurse Lorie Kirkley goes missing from the safety of her own home in what appears to be a burglary gone wrong. When several strange clues are found, the entire small town of Valparaiso, Indiana, comes under suspicion.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: When the sexy and beautiful Charlene is around, sparks fly. But the sparks aren't limited to one man. One after another, Josh, Jace, Tim and Casey all go crazy vying for her love. And while love is a many splendored thing, it can also have a body count.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Bad Apple
programme.desc: Nicky and his wife Ellie appear to be living the perfect retirement until one of them is found dead in an apple orchard.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Watery Grave
programme.desc: Jeff and Jeanine Glanda have a picture-perfect family until selfishness and a shameless affair mark the beginning of the end. As money troubles and the threat of divorce breed paranoia and hate, a plot is hatched in the dark heart of a twisted killer.

programme.title: Shattered: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: 1981. A teenager forms a search party to find his missing 5-year-old sister. 1995. A mother frantically searches for her young son who disappears while playing near the river, and an officer prays when she recognizes the prime suspect in both cases.

programme.title: Shattered: A Very Bad Day
programme.desc: One morning in 1994, a high school student holds his class hostage at gunpoint. As students, teachers and police are faced with impending disaster, they have no idea that the worst of the day's carnage is yet to be discovered.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Vanishing Teens
programme.desc: In the fall of 1991, rural Michigan is plunged into paranoia and fear when four local teenage girls vanish without a trace. The community is in lockdown as residents face up to the very real possibility that a predator walks among them.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: She Called 911
programme.desc: When a 42-year-old woman is strangled to death and posed in an unusual way in her bedroom, detectives are on the hunt for someone who would have wanted to humiliate her after murdering her. A hidden 911 call turns the case on its head.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Wound Never Heals
programme.desc: Fresh-faced teen Barbara Rowan's family is devastated when she fails to come home one evening. Days later, she is found dead, but it will take three decades, a dogged cold-case detective, and advancements in crime technology to find Barbara's killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bloodshed on Beattie Street
programme.desc: A former police chief who owns most of the homes on his street gets into constant conflict with a young renter who doesn't respect his authority. The war between them intensifies until blood flows down the street of their cul-de-sac.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Officer Down
programme.desc: The small town of Higginson, Arkansas, only has two full-time police officers. When one of them is brutally gunned down on duty, everyone in the community wants answers.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Didn't Do Anything
programme.desc: A former escort hires a hitman to kill her husband. She thinks she's committed the perfect crime when officers notify her that he is dead. Little does she know that the police have been watching and recording her every move.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Fantasy Over Family
programme.desc: A troubled 29-year-old son gets kicked out of his parents' house after spending the family fortune on a web-cam model. But when his mother, father, and brother are found murdered, the young man insists he's innocent.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Now They Lay Me Down to Sleep
programme.desc: A death row inmate grants a final interview weeks before his execution. After a tragic house fire in Texas, suspicion lands on a husband and father when the brutally murdered bodies of his family are discovered in the ashes and he doesn't blink an eye.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Now They Lay Me Down to Sleep
programme.desc: A death row inmate grants a final interview weeks before his execution. After a tragic house fire in Texas, suspicion lands on a husband and father when the brutally murdered bodies of his family are discovered in the ashes and he doesn't blink an eye.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: A loving mother is shot three times at a gas station in Memphis, Tennessee. As police search for clues, a mysterious letter threatens to complicate the already-tense relationship between local law enforcement and the community they've sworn to protect.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: After getting arrested for robbery, Robert Askew runs from a work camp and goes back to stealing to make a living. Askew eventually gets caught again, but he escapes from jail during a hurricane and goes on a crime spree, breaking into vacation homes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Silence a Witness
programme.desc: An Oklahoma drug lord killed a man for revenge, and fled to Mexico to escape prosecution.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Firepower
programme.desc: In this action packed episode we see the secret device that will tear apart terrorist bombs; the new squad weapon that will get you out of an ambush; the latest surface to air missile and the US Army's latest sniper rifle.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Death of Hitler
programme.desc: History tells us that Adolf Hitler committed suicide in his bunker in Berlin. However, some dissenting voices disagree.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: This Old House: Detroit/ Ready for Rehab

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael rush to finish the Country House before winter hits, but their schedule and budget are tested when an open permit, left on the barn by previous owners, is discovered.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Down in Deep Creek, Maryland

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fix Up on Deep Creek

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Jessica Alba: The Honest Company

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Rock and Roll Cupcakes
programme.desc: Bakers compete for a showcase at a party celebrating the I Heart Radio music festival.

programme.title: Buddy's Bakery Rescue: Baked Euphoria
programme.desc: Baked Euphoria was founded to give customers a sugar high, but with declining business, it's now owner Bonnie that needs a pick-me-up. Buddy steps in to repair the low morale and fix the menu before this business becomes a complete downer.

programme.title: Buddy's Bakery Rescue: Kristi G's Cupcakes & More
programme.desc: Buddy heads to Texas where Kristi quit her corporate job to open a cupcake shop. Business has been tough, with slumping sales and trying to manage her staff full of family members. With the threat of closing her shop, can Buddy solve this bakery's issues?

programme.title: Buddy's Bakery Rescue: Drew's Pastry Place
