programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hamming it Up
programme.desc: Today is about Roger's favorite animal - the pig. He's hamming it up with some of the country's best suppliers or cured, smoked, and aged pork.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mediterranean Seafood Fests
programme.desc: Roger heads to Northern California for two spectacular wood-fired Mediterranean seafood feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South Carolina Surf and Turf

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pigging Out On Pork

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Red-Hot Roasts

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mimic Madness/ House Worming
programme.desc: When worms move in to SpongeBob's holes, it's up to him to hide his disgusting new friends from everyone else.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidtastic Voyage/ That's No Lady
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick shrink and travel inside Squidward's body; Patrick thinks that he must get out of town.

programme.title: It's Pony: Useful/ Stompy!
programme.desc: Annie fears Dad will find Pony useless to the farm and get ride of him. Then, while fighting with Dog, Pony accidentally stomps on Annie's foot, just when she is all set to play soccer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test.

programme.title: Breadwinners: From Bad to Nurse/ Lost at Pond
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce show off their 'bread-side' manner by nursing their number one customer back to health. The guys get stranded in the middle of a really big pond.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Sister Sam / Perfect Chemistry
programme.desc: Patrick's big sister Samantha comes for a visit; Sandy and Plankton bond over their shared love of science.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe Is Untied/ Something Smells
programme.desc: Squid is put in charge of getting Pat a new pair of shoes; Bob eats sea-onion ice cream.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Brendar the Barbarian
programme.desc: Brendar is expelled from the Royal Order of Warrior Princesses, and is left as a 'feared and revered' Barbarian.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Off to See the Wizard
programme.desc: Brendar and Evan travel to Horus’ castle, where the wizard hires her to defeat the evil witch who turned his daughter into an owl. Brendar chooses Axe as her payment, while Evan has to prove he’s worthy of going with the group on the quest.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: The group must pass through the ominous Swamp of Fears.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: My Sharon-Ah
programme.desc: Brendar faces off against a Royal Order rival, but the result casts doubt about her ability to complete her ultimate quest.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Parent Just Don’t Understand
programme.desc: Evan is forced to return to his parents’ house to secure Trolls Passage on the group’s journey, but it won’t be easy since he already burned that bridge.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: When Dragons Cry
programme.desc: To get the dragon’s tears needed for Axe, the group must first visit a magical marketplace, where Stacey’s meeting with a witch finally reveals Brendar’s complicated backstory.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Mapmaker, Mapmaker, Make Me a Map
programme.desc: In need of a unique custom map for their next quest, Brendar and the group attempt to wine and dine the only map maker in Gothmoria capable of creating the map they need.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: Danger Force: Ray Goes Cray
programme.desc: Two students keep Danger Force from going on missions, so Danger Force and Captain Man must use their powers to get the students to leave.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Back to the Danger
programme.desc: When Drex prevents young Ray from ever being densitized in the past, Henry and a now destructible Ray must take on Drex and help Ray get back his indestructibility.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Sushi Sitter/ Cheer Beast
programme.desc: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Live and Dangerous
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are invited are invited by internet celebrity Frankini to a party, but when they arrive they find that Frankini has plans to reveal their identities to the world.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Fish Talker/ Wet Doom
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger use Schowz' Fish-Talker helmet to help a lost fish find his way home. While stuck in a restaurant bathroom, Ray, Henry, Charlotte, Jasper, and Schwoz reminisce about past adventures.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Danger Games
programme.desc: Frustrated by his failed villainy, Dr. Minyak plans to ruin Double G's worldwide charity concert. Captain Man and Kid Danger join forces with the Game Shakers to defeat Dr. Minyak and keep Double G safe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star Comes to Earth/ Party With a Pony
programme.desc: Fun-loving magical teen princess, Star Butterfly, who after a few skirmishes with other-worldly monsters, is sent by her Royal Parents to live with the Diaz family on Earth, bringing along her own unique inter-dimensional style to her new planet.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Matchmaker/ School Spirit
programme.desc: In an effort to get a better grade on her math test, Star offers to help her teacher Miss Skullnick with her love life but accidentally turns her into a troll. Star sets booby traps to protect the football team.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Monster Arm/ The Other Exchange Student
programme.desc: When Marco breaks his arm before a big karate tournament, Star tries to fix it with magic but accidentally turns it into a giant tentacle. The Diazes are visited by their charming former exchange student Gustav, and Star quickly becomes jealous.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Cheer Up Star/ Quest Buy
programme.desc: When Star is having a bad day, Marco comes up with a plan to cheer her up. Later, they venture to Quest Bay to purchase a new wand charger before Star's wand dies.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Diaz Family Vacation/ Brittney's Party
programme.desc: After inviting the Diaz's on a trip to Mewni as a last minute anniversary present, Star and Marco must save them from a many-headed serpent. Star must fight off Ludo and his army of monsters when they crash Brittney Wong's birthday party.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewberty/ Pixtopia
programme.desc: Marco and his friends run up Star’s Magic Mirror bill with prank phone calls, so they all travel to a dimension of pixies to pay it off. Star starts sprouting hearts all over her body, the telltale sign of Mewberty.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Lobster Claws/ Sleep Spells
programme.desc: Ludo fires one of his minions, Lobster Claws, so Marco and Star help him adjust to life on Earth. Marco uses psychology to help Star when she starts using magic in her sleep.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Blood Moon Ball/ Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: Star accepts her ex-boyfriend Tom's invitation to Demon Prom, but Marco is suspicious of Tom's intentions and crashes the prom to prevent Star from getting her heart broken again.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Freeze Day/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: Star accidentally freezes time with her wand, so she and Marco must travel to the Plains of Time to convince Father Time to get back on his time wheel.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: St. Olga's Reform School for Wayward Princesses
programme.desc: To give Pony Head a good birthday, Star must face her greatest fear - going to St. Olga’s Reform School for Wayward Princesses, to bust her out. Once there, Star and Marco find the school is even worse than they thought and their plan won't be easy.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewnipendance Day/ The Banagic Incident
programme.desc: Star leads a battle re-enactment as part of a Mewni Independence Day celebration with her friends on Earth. Then, Star sees a commercial for a magical Earth product and sets off on her own to buy it.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Interdimensional Field Trip/ Marco Grows a Beard
programme.desc: Star leads a class field trip to a museum in another dimension and puts the entire class in danger. Then, when Star flubs the spell used to help Marco grow a beard, the beard grows out of control and engulfs the house.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: When Marco is captured by Toffee and held for wand-ransom, Star enters into an unlikely alliance with Ludo and Buff Frog.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: My New Wand!/ Ludo in the Wild
programme.desc: Star has to free Marco from a magically locked closet without her new wand. Ludo is thrown into nature and must overcome the elements and creatures of the wilderness to survive.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mr. Candle Cares/ Red Belt
programme.desc: Star rebels after the school guidance counselor, Mr. Candle, insists that her future is set in stone. Then, Marco finally decides to focus on earning his red belt in karate.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star on Wheels/ Fetch
programme.desc: When Marco teaches Star how to ride a bike but forgets to tell her about brakes, he teams up with Oskar and Glossaryck to save her. A mysterious stray dog steals Star's wand and refuses give it back.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star vs. Echo Creek/ Wand to Wand
programme.desc: Star goes into hiding after accidentally destroying a car. Later, Star and Ludo struggle to learn how to use their new wands properly.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Starstruck/ Camping Trip
programme.desc: When Star's biggest hero Mina Loveberry, a rogue magic-wielder from Mewni, loses her mojo for battle, Star attempts to help her get it back. Later, King Butterfly pays a surprise visit to Star during the Diaz family camping trip.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Starsitting/ On the Job
programme.desc: When Star and Marco are in charge of watching Buffrog's tadpoles, the duo's babysitting styles clash. Later, Buffrog has to complete an important mission in order to care for his kids.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: A Dog's Best Friend / Boom Night
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Power To The Puppies / Who The Dog Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Is this a Dream?! Or is it a Nightmare?!
programme.desc: The results are in, and the final participants of the Legend Festival have been decided! Hikaru’s ranked battle history has earned him a shot against the rest of the Blading Legends, but Hyuga's fate remains uncertain.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Rise to Victory! Triumph Dragon!
programme.desc: Dante Koryu is itching to battle the Hizashi brothers, and Hyuga is up first! Meanwhile, after hearing about Lain’s unrivaled strength, Cap’n seeks him out to see if this ‘flare’ is all it’s cracked up to be. It's a showdown of guts and glory!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond

programme.desc: SpongeBob has a change in demeanor after Squidward closes the gap in his teeth.

programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mustard O' Mine/ Shopping List
programme.desc: When The Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more. SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton is following their every step.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patnocchio/ ChefBob
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince him to steal him a Krabby Patty. SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubble Bass's Tab/ Kooky Cooks
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidward's Sick Daze/ Under the Small Top
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part I
programme.desc: Kid Danger and friends try to get Captain Man back from the past as Drex continues his scheme to erase Swellview's memory of Captain Man forever.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part II
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man battle Drex atop a blimp to stop him from erasing Swellview's memory of Captain, but one hero must stay behind when the blimp heads straight for the Swellview Baby Hospital.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Finds Out
programme.desc: While Ross is away in China, Rachel learns that he has been in love with her for years.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rachel anxiously waits for Ross at the airport in order to tell him that she loves him.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Breast Milk
programme.desc: Ross looks after his newborn son and freaks when somebody drinks the breast milk.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Heckles Dies
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel's grumpy and lonely downstairs neighbour, Mr. Heckles, suddenly dies.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Husband
programme.desc: Phoebe's gay husband turns up asking for a divorce so he can marry another woman.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Five Steaks and An Eggplant
programme.desc: A woman accidently calls Chandler when she is looking for her ex-boyfriend Bob when Chandler answers the phone in Bob's stead and fixes himself up on a date with her at the diner. Ross is reluctant to let Chandler hit on Jade, but Chandler has his way.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby on the Bus
programme.desc: Babysitting, Joey and Chandler take baby Ben out on the town to help them attract women, but they lose him on the bus.

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: After downing a fierce dragon, a young Viking is unable to kill it. Instead, the dragon and the boy form a friendship that opens their eyes to each other's worlds.

programme.title: Full House: The Volunteer

programme.title: Full House: Gotta Dance
programme.desc: Stephanie thinks she wants a career as a professional dancer; Rebecca wants a baby shower.

programme.title: Full House: Happy Birthday Babies
programme.desc: Michelle's Flintstone party is interrupted by the birth of Jesse and Rebecca's twin sons.

programme.title: Full House: Happy Birthday Babies
programme.desc: Jesse and Rebecca become the parents of identical twin boys on Michelle's birthday.

programme.title: Full House: Nicky and/ or Alexander
programme.desc: While Rebecca returns home after the birth of the twins, Danny gets a new co-host.

programme.title: Full House: Bachelor of the Month
programme.desc: When Danny becomes 'Bachelor of the Month', he is suddenly desired by lots of women.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: As Seen on TV/ Can You Spare a Dime
programme.desc: Krabs makes a low-budget commercial; accused of stealing, Squidward quits his job.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Pictures of Boo
programme.desc: In need of shelter from a storm and desperately seeking sleep, the group of questers are welcomed into a mysterious house by a strange Colonel.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Hat for Pat/ Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job as a sign-holder. SpongeBob and Patrick spend the night locked in a toy store.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Stego Search
programme.desc: The Warden takes away Javi’s keytar, putting him in a bad mood, which he refuses to explain to the team. Javi is forced to open up about his problems in order to find his Zord.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sand Castles in the Sand/ Shell Shocked
programme.desc: A friendly day of building sand castles soon turns into all out war when SpongeBob and Patrick use their sand creations to battle each other. When Gary's shell breaks, SpongeBob tries to find him a replacement.

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Three musically inclined chipmunks, Alvin, Simon and Theodore, meet frustrated songwriter David Seville and impress him with their singing talent.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Place/ Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Patty Creature Feature/ Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fun-Sized Friends/ Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid Noir/ ScavengerPants
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down. Squidward sends SpongeBob and Patrick on an increasingly difficult scavenger hunt to get them out of his hair.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Retires/ Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Bucket/Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Plankton clones himself and Mr. Krabs, and Squidward switches jobs with a school bus driver, but SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Boss Maybe/ Family Bonding
programme.desc: Leni struggles to be the family babysitter. And, Lincoln and Clyde investigate new neighbours.

programme.title: The Loud House: Silence of the Luans/ Undercover Mom
programme.desc: With Luan locked in a cell in the basement, who is responsible for the April Fool’s Day pranks this year?/ Mom goes undercover as a student at the high school and becomes BFFs with Leni, Luna and Luan.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Battle in the Gravel

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers: Blood Is Thicker Than Mud

programme.desc: When Claudia and Robin's test drilling for jade comes up empty, even the company geologists can't agree on a plan. As the drilling budget runs dry, the partners risk losing their financial backers and the whole season.

programme.title: Jade Fever: Got a Rope
programme.desc: Claudia, Robin and the crew scramble to get their heavy equipment up Wolverine Mountain before rising rivers make it impossible to get to the mining claim. When Larry's army-issue trailer bends under the weight of the dozer, everyone is left stranded.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal get a little too greedy with fellow shoppers at the market and then offer disservices to a focus group. Tonight's loser learns that the grass is always pinker on the other side.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Fortune Feimster
programme.desc: The chefs replicate Orange Chicken from Panda Express for Fortune Feimster.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Ron Funches
programme.desc: Ron Funches has a new healthy lifestyle, but he's willing to make an exception for Wendy's spicy chicken sandwich. The three chefs try to replicate the sandwich to his liking.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Having a Baby
programme.desc: Adam dispels the myth about getting pregnant after 35, delves into breastfeeding vs. formula, and explores postpartum depression for women, and men.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Weight Loss
programme.desc: Adam illustrates all the reasons low-fat diets can actually make you fatter, and why counting calories is a waste of time.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating
programme.desc: Adam swipes right on knowledge by exposing the flaws in dating sites. Plus, alpha males, and wolves, don't exist, and personality tests are a failure.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes
programme.desc: In this special episode, Michael gives a fresh look to your favourite tricks with never-before-seen footage. From the arcade to the science lab, Michael revisits classic moments with footage from the cutting room floor.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Two
programme.desc: In this special, a trip down memory lane turns trippy when Michael revisits classic bits, including the hallucinogenic frog and the glue-sniffing mishap, to unlock never-before-seen reactions to your favorite jaw-dropping tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Three
programme.desc: In this special, Michael revisits some of the spookiest bits of Carbonaro past to reveal fresh frights with never-before-seen reactions to tricks, including the alien abduction, musical ghosts and mad science experiments gone wrong.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Four
programme.desc: Michael takes viewers behind the scenes and shows them never seen tricks.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 5
programme.desc: A hung-over hang-glider, several BMX klutzes, and a naked motorcycle stunt guy who gets road rash in the worst possible place.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 6
programme.desc: An alligator trainer who's almost alligator lunch, a clumsy cliff diver, and an amateur stunt man who will probably never go pro.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 7
programme.desc: Thrill seekers are captured in their less than fine moments, from flying cars to bikes with two bicyclists.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Breathe In, Breathe Out
programme.desc: The Interns watch an elephant attack a brunch, a truck brave a flood and a bull remove a man's pants. Plus, the NSA Director pays them an accidental visit.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Compromised Agent
programme.desc: The NSA Interns uncover insane videos, including a man who tests homemade chloroform on himself and a massive wedding fail. Plus, the interns investigate a rogue agent's social media.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Introducing David Blane
programme.desc: Wes, Eric and Alex find an average joe named David Blane and train him to live up to his magical namesake. Afterwards, the boys drop magic at the Dollar Store.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Ramsay's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Wes, Eric and Alex celebrate Chris Ramsay's birthday with tricks, surprises and a shocking birthday cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crying Out Loud
programme.desc: Determined to make Alex celebrate her senior ditch day, Phil, Luke and Haley forcefully take her out but end up on an unexpected detour. Claire is torn when she gets a job offer from a big hotel chain.

programme.title: Modern Family: American Skyper
programme.desc: The whole family is at Jay and Gloria's for Alex's graduation party, except for Phil. He ingeniously figures out a way to be there via Skype and a robotic vessel after being unexpectedly detained in Seattle on a business trip.

programme.title: Movie: Last Holiday
programme.desc: When a department store clerk finds out she's got three weeks to live, she decides to cash in her savings and live it up in Europe.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashians on Vacation
programme.desc: Travel around the world with Kim and the gang, as the defining moments from each of the Kardashian family vacations are recapped.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Kourtney sets boundaries with her Poosh team when the line between business and friendship becomes blurred. Caitlyn reaches out to Kris for some help with a business venture. Khloe and Tristan have an unexplainable experience while searching for aliens.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End of an Era
programme.desc: The family makes a big decision about the future of the show and reflects on how Keeping Up will truly be an end of an era. Kris goes on a girls’ trip to decompress from the decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Season of Change
programme.desc: Khloè runs into some unexpected obstacles while exploring surrogacy. Scott worries that the family will drift apart now that the show is coming to an end. Kim is determined to figure out who is behind the satirical social media page NorisBlackBook.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up with the Kids
programme.desc: When Tristan realizes that Khloe is stressed about her living situation, he takes steps to make her feel more comfortable. Scott feels compelled to share some of his most sentimental moments from the show with his kids.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News
programme.desc: While planning an over-the-top birthday surprise for her mom, Kim receives some bad news about her legal studies that makes her question whether she is cut out to be a lawyer. Kourtney finds out that Kendall has been secretly returning all of her gifts.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End
programme.desc: The family departs on one last family trip to Lake Tahoe where they relive some of their fondest memories from the show. Kim deals with some turbulence in her marriage.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Last Holiday
programme.desc: When a department store clerk finds out she's got three weeks to live, she decides to cash in her savings and live it up in Europe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, CA, a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, MI, the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Funky Finds in 'da House
programme.desc: Guy and his son video chat with four DD alums that walk them through one of their recipes. The recipes include a funky waffle from Syracuse, gourmet mac 'n' cheese from Cleveland and California smoked turkey and green chile pork with an island twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Round the World Roundup
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into a world of flavours all over the United States! In Smyrna, Georgia, a doctor-turned-chef fires up amazing Asian from righteous ramen to Korean wings. In Austin, Texas, two buddies turn out their tasty take on tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Mouthfuls
programme.desc: Guy's unhinging his jaw for some mega mouthfuls! In Robbinsville, New Jersey, a real-deal Italian market cookin' up prosciutto bread and their multi-meat 'boss of the sauce'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Summer Spectacular
programme.desc: Fire up the grills and get the party started, Guy Fieri's bringin' the heat! In this one-hour special, it's all about summer.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South Beach Sizzle
programme.desc: Guy hits spots in South Beach, Florida like a taqueria and a German restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unique Eats
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is grabbin' some unique eats. First, in Santa Fe, N.M., a not-your-everyday Indian spot servin' up favorites like dosas and lamb curry. Then, a deli in Reno, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Taste of Asia
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's gettin' a big taste of the Far East. In Las Vegas, the city's original Japanese spot rolls out serious sushi and traditional udon. Then, a Vegas winner is dealin' in righteous pork, and see an Asian spin on classic grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamite Duos
programme.desc: In New York's Lower East Side, Guy is pickling, smoking, curing and fermenting, everything from the goat necks to chicken wings to pig ears.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat in the Middle
programme.desc: Guy is grabbing dishes stacked and stuffed with off-the-hook goodness. In Baltimore, he checks out the pasta bar rolling out delicious ravioli and topping things off with their killer clams.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Quick-Nic
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, take advantage of a gorgeous day by preparing for a picnic. Their stress-free and easy-to-make recipes include Orzo Salad, Watermelon Salsa, Apricot Rosemary Glazed Chicken, Zucchini Bread and a Citrus Cocktail.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Fan Fare
programme.desc: Trisha spends the day connecting with her fans on social media. She shares fan videos and stories while cooking up brunch, which includes cinnamon orange rolls, a bloody Mary, cheesy spicy bacon straws, and hummingbird pancakes.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Just Me and My Boys
programme.desc: Valerie loves family traditions and decides to creates a new family favorite to celebrate the men in her life.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Chicken Cacciatore for the Soul
programme.desc: Colton Underwood is an ex-football player who now runs a non-profit to benefit people living with cystic fibrosis.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Grilling to Go
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's grilling up a well-deserved tailgate lunch. On the menu are smoky salt and pepper drumsticks, flame-grilled cheesy steakburgers, grilled taters with onions and garlic, spicy street corn and blueberry hand pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Birthday for Two
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her husband, Ladd, are celebrating their birthdays with a dinner for two. While he's out on the ranch, she makes skillet spaghetti and meatballs with her favourite cheesy pesto garlic bread pinwheel.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Dinner Start to Finish
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes dinner in real time, beginning at the end with an old favorite, perfect potluck dessert. Then she moves on to classic steak Diane, easy roasted parmesan potatoes and incredible garlic butter mushrooms.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Nick's Special Birthday TV Dinner
programme.desc: Molly Yeh puts together a TV dinner-themed evening to celebrate Nick's birthday. She's making succulent bacon wrapped meatloaves, mashed cheesy potatoes with pan gravy, spicy easy peasies and a stunning Battenberg cake for the birthday boy.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: A Bite Out of Memory Lane
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli makes dishes that remind her of her favorite on-screen roles. There's lemony cacio y pepe and steakhouse shrimp cocktail with sister sauces, and for dessert, she bakes an orange vanilla bean angel food cake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Stargazing
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister Beth spend the afternoon making bacon wrapped dried apricots, grilled garlic Caesar salad, grilled summer veggie pasta, and lemon blackberry cheesecake parfait.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Slumber Party
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood celebrates her friend Glenda's birthday with a slumber party in comfy clothes, and delicious treats are on the menu.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Best Brunch Ever
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro has lovingly compiled his go-to brunch favorites. He revisits the other hosts' recipes and creates a corned beef hash brown muffuletta that's to die for! Katie Lee Biegel fires up a smoked salmon breakfast pizza.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: America's Funniest Food Show
programme.desc: Things get zany in the kitchen when the king of dad jokes, actor and comedian Bob Saget, teams up with "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell to get the last laugh on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Worldly Ways
programme.desc: The Kitchen's host Sunny Anderson and world traveler Andrew Zimmern join forces to beat Bobby Flay. They handpick Brooklyn's finest Jared Forman and Italian master chef Fabio Viviani to deliver the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Nutty Times
programme.desc: "Chopped's" Geoffrey Zakarian and Amanda Freitag enlist Jimmy Buffett's private chef Dante Giannini and Telluride's Eliza Gavin to edge out the win and wipe out Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Comforts of Home
programme.desc: Jackie Rothong takes on Matteo Boffo, each hoping to send the other one packing early.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Double Trouble
programme.desc: It's up to the dynamic duo of Daphne Oz and Damaris Phillips to decide who has the skill to paint Bobby Flay out of the picture as chef and artist Enrique Limardo goes up against Southwestern chef Jeff Smedstad in an all-out culinary battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Queen Returns
programme.desc: Culinary queen Martha Stewart returns with Iron Chef Michael Symon to defeat Bobby Flay. They bring in two young guns, brunch queen Sarah Wade and sous chef Max Castro, to see if Bobby can keep up with the future food generation.

programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Hunted by Bigfoot
programme.desc: Reports of Bigfoot in Ohio prompt two friends to go into the woods and investigate the claims. As they travel deeper into the forest, they hear strange howls. Suddenly, the sounds start to multiply and the hunters realize they are being hunted.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Bigfoot and Ghost Cave
programme.desc: A fishing trip changed David's life forever when he and his grandfather found themselves under attack by an unknown creature. Then, Zac and Lesla come across a cave in the woods and decide to head into the darkness where they encounter a violent entity.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Cabin in the Woods and Bigfoot Encounter
programme.desc: While traveling for a friend's wedding, James and Weste begrudgingly accept an offer to stay in an abandoned cabin in the woods. A night of terror ensues, with paranormal encounters lasting through the night. Then, Eric is stalked by an unknown creature.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: The Hell Hound
programme.desc: While exploring an abandoned hospital in Ohio, Amy encounters an uneasy presence in a cell and quickly flees from the building. Little does she know, the entity has latched onto her and stalks her to the woods surrounding her home.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Bigfoot Showdown & The Catacombs
programme.desc: Rodney's camping trip in Kentucky turns life threatening as he and his fellow campers are tormented through the night by a Bigfoot creature. Then, a group of friends access a catacomb in Georgia where they perform a séance that goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione return to Hogwarts to find and destroy the last of the horcruxes.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
programme.desc: Newt Scamander reaches New York at the end of his journey researching magical creatures in 1926. When a muggle accidentally lets some of his creatures loose, Newt is forced to team up with an Auror to recapture the beasts amid rising tensions in the city.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald
programme.desc: True to his promise, the dark wizard Grindelwald escapes from custody while being transferred to Europe to answer for his crimes, and begins assembling followers who share his ambitions, but he's opposed by a young wizard with a love of magical beasts.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: A family man and snowplow driver is named his small town's citizen of the year for his lifetime of service to the snowy community, but his euphoria is shattered when his son turns up dead, transforming the father into a killer out for revenge.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: Ryan's Renovation: My Big Fat Greek Renovation
programme.desc: When Ryan and Emilia embark on a top-to-bottom renovation of a historic 8,000 square-foot Brooklyn brownstone in Boerum Hill, they stumble upon a host of structural and mechanical problems which threaten to break their budget and hearts.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Walkups and Meltdowns
programme.desc: Over in Brooklyn, Ryan attempts to woo the hard-to-get developer of his dreams. Back in Manhattan, things heat up at Tyler's hunky fireman open house. KJ leaves her new West Village penthouse but she breaks down when a bigger threat looms over the world.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: She's a Boss
programme.desc: Josh Altman may have money on his mind, but he's got baby on the brain, Josh Flagg is ready to dance to the top of the real estate market and waltz down the aisle with his fiancé and a new realtor enters the fray and she is not to be messed with.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: A Tantalizing Offer
programme.desc: Since dominating the LA market, Josh Altman heads to an exclusive enclave to try and snag a potentially record-breaking listing. He's put to the test when the sellers don't fall for the Altman charm. Madison's rocky relationship with James crashes a deal.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: Due to record-low inventory in the Los Angeles real estate market, Josh Flagg and the Altman Brothers are forced out of their comfort zone. Altman lands the palatial home in Bradbury Estates, but a major mistake threatens his open house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Hashtag Sell This B*tch!
programme.desc: Josh Altman has high rollers from Chicago in town, looking to wheel and deal. If Altman can't find their dream house for an insane best deal, he'll walk away with nothing. James and David have re-strategized their listing with a giant open house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Two Tops Never Work
programme.desc: Flagg is forced to co-list with rival realtor (and 'Real Househusband') Mauricio Umansky. Tracy lands a dream listing in Brentwood that quickly turns into a nightmare, as Altman gets an offer on his mansion in the Bradbury Estates that just might work.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Homewood's Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Tracy battles two brokers from her past to sell a problematic listing in Brentwood. James lands a classic Beverly Hills home, but the owner has some old-school demands. Madison introduces Cody to the entire family, and pops a big question.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Who's Your Daddy?
programme.desc: Josh Flagg struggles to find the balance between planning his wedding and juggling over-the-top clients. Tracy has a listing with a first-time developer with high expectations. The Altmans race to the hospital as their baby daughter is born.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: It Wasn't in My Budget!
programme.desc: James and David make a pitch to represent the hottest new high rise building in Los Angeles. A wealthy socialite with tight purse strings sees Madison for a summer rental. Tracy's client wants to sell two properties, but has lofty expectations on price.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Mile High Club
programme.desc: Josh and Matt Altman land the biggest mansion in Bradbury Estates. Madison battles structural problems and mold to sell a friend's house in Brentwood. The Brits throw a party for their penthouse listings, but sparks fly when Altman and Flagg face off.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Keys to the Castle
programme.desc: Tracy heads to New York to be mentored by Fredrik Eklund, and to pitch herself to Douglas Elliman President Howard Lorber for a slew of new high-rise projects in L.A. Altman tackles the beast of Bradbury Estates, Bliss Canyon.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Love and Listings
programme.desc: Flagg and Bobby work together on their first co-list and Flagg gets emotional during their wedding rehearsal diner. Tracy's ex-client comes crawling back, while Josh Altman faces a tough deadline to sell a tear-down on the Riviera Golf Course.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: The Brits host a luxurious open house for their $45 million dollar Bel Air listing, and sparks fly when Flagg and Altman come face to face. Madison gets creative in selling a Malibu Country home, while Flagg and Bobby tie the knot in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Smoke on the Daughter

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Fare Lady

programme.title: The Simpsons: Springfield Splendor

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fears of a Clown

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.desc: Swift, great grand-daughter of the late Flower, now leads the Whiskers with the help of long-term partner Brea. Today her thirteenth litter is due to emerge. Things aren't so rosy for Flint Lockwood, matriarch of the Hakuna Matata gang.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Our Blue Planet
programme.desc: Explore parts of the ocean that have never been visited, encounter extraordinary animals and discover insights into life beneath the waves. Sir David Attenborough then examines the impact of human activity.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Making of Blue Planet II
programme.desc: The stories behind Planet Earth: Blue Planet II's most memorable moments. Discover what went into creating this stunning series, as the crews reveal the lengths they went to and the ground-breaking filming technology.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Slowly Slowly Catchy Monkey
programme.desc: Eve is attempting to rebuild her life, having been shot by Villanelle. Villanelle is also moving on, until she is approached by an old foe. Carolyn is being undermined at work and Kenny can’t leave his own investigation into The Twelve alone.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Management Sucks
programme.desc: Eve and Carolyn are reeling. Eve strikes up an unlikely alliance with Kenny's colleagues at the Bitter Pill. Villanelle finds that management isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Meetings Have Biscuits
programme.desc: Villanelle agrees to a job which will take her back to London. Carolyn's Moscow contacts come in use when Eve and the Bitter Pill team unravel a potential lead to the Twelve. Konstantin finds himself under pressure from all sides.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Still Got It
programme.desc: Eve is trying to patch up things with Niko. Villanelle receives good news about her upcoming promotion but can't shake the feeling that there's still something missing from her life. Dasha seeks a solution to Villanelle's erratic behavior.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Are You From Pinner?
programme.desc: Villanelle returns home to Mother Russia to try to find her family. Perhaps a new connection to her roots will give her back what's been missing in her life.

programme.title: Killing Eve: End of Game
programme.desc: Carolyn finds out information is being withheld by those close to her. Eve finds a lead on Villanelle. Meanwhile, Villanelle has had enough and decides on a different path. Konstantin’s loyalties are split.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Beautiful Monster
programme.desc: Carolyn is frustrated with the lack of progress in the investigation. Meanwhile, Eve is focused on Villanelle and finds a clue to her whereabouts. Villanelle and Dasha work together on a kill. The pressure is getting to Konstantin.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Are You Leading or Am I?
programme.desc: Konstantin makes a break for it. Carolyn might have finally found what she’s looking for. Eve and Villanelle try to work out what the future may hold for them. Together or apart.

programme.title: Movie: Van Helsing
programme.desc: A famed monster hunter must battle Count Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's Monster.

programme.title: Narco Wars: Mexico’s First Cartel
programme.desc: A deeper look into the birth of Mexico’s first-ever drug Cartel.

programme.title: Narco Wars: Escobar Goes to War
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar goes to war against the authorities and his rivals, the Cali cartel.

programme.title: Narco Wars: After Pablo
programme.desc: Escobar is dead. The new cocaine kings are the Rodriguez brothers and their Cali Cartel.

programme.title: Narco Wars: Rise of the Narco Army
programme.desc: How one drug lord created Mexico’s first narco army unleashing a cartel feared by all.

programme.title: Narco Wars: The Enemy Within: The Mob: The Mafia Meth King
programme.desc: A Philadelphia mobster builds a meth empire.

programme.title: Narco Wars: Chapo Public Enemy No. 1

programme.title: Narco Wars: The Enemy Within: The Mob: The Mafia Meth King
programme.desc: A Philadelphia mobster builds a meth empire.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: High Behind Bars
programme.desc: Inmates still find ways to get drugs inside jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Designer Dope
programme.desc: A look at dozens of legal compounds that mimic cocaine, ecstasy or marijuana.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Oxy Nation
programme.desc: Prescription pills are the narcotics of choice for today’s generation.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Vitamin K

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Chicago Crack
programme.desc: The business of crack cocaine takes its toll worldwide.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Kitty Kitty Fang Fang
programme.desc: In this week’s episode, the team prepares to relocate two panther cubs.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: New Rhino on the Block
programme.desc: A newborn rhino needs a name while a monkey faces a life-or-death crisis.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Hatch Me if You Can
programme.desc: The ZooTampa team is counting down the days until they get to welcome new baby penguins.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Bear Necessities
programme.desc: It’s spring at ZooTampa, and the animals are emerging from hibernation.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: One Way or the Otter
programme.desc: Baby fever takes over ZooTampa as the penguin keepers are on egg watch.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Oh Rhi-No You Don't!
programme.desc: For the first time in ten years, Taronga vets get up close to a silverback gorilla.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Rhi-yes or Rhino?
programme.desc: Are two of Taronga rhinoceros pregnant? Vets use different methods to find out.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Horror on Spike Island
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a vast and mysterious geometric shape on a harbor island in Southern Ireland; experts investigate and uncover a notoriously brutal 19th century prison containing a torturous and deadly past.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Amazon Nazis
programme.desc: When investigators spot strange anomalies in the Amazon jungle, the discovery stokes rumors of a long-lost Nazi base in the Americas; experts follow the evidence to a grisly find, revealing a secret history of nuclear secrets and a notorious dictator.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Amazon Nazis
programme.desc: When investigators spot strange anomalies in the Amazon jungle, the discovery stokes rumors of a long-lost Nazi base in the Americas; experts follow the evidence to a grisly find, revealing a secret history of nuclear secrets and a notorious dictator.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.desc: Features umbrellas; outboard motors; silver cutlery; tape measures.

programme.desc: Follow the production from start to finish of kayaks, safety boots, electronic signs and breakfast cereals.

programme.desc: On this episode of How it's Made: Tea; Roof Finials; Artificial Flowers; Alloy Wheels.

programme.desc: Nails and staples, safety glasses, fabrics, bicycles -- find out how each of these every day items are made and put together.

programme.desc: Follow the production of balloons, wallpaper, frozen french fries and incandescent light bulbs.

programme.desc: Featuring wood watches; steel bicycles; raw pet food; replica police lanterns.

programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.desc: Discover how compact disks, cheese, pantyhose and fluorescent tubes are made.

programme.desc: Find out how classic car gauges, chocolate marble cake, ghillie kettles, and rubber gloves are made.

programme.desc: Find out how ultra-thin glass, pallet dismantling machines, cupcakes, and seamless stainless steel tubes are made.
