programme.desc: This episode features racing leathers, evaporative cooling towers, wooden rocking chairs and wire wheels.

programme.title: How It's Made: Goalie Pads, Lapel Pins, Cardboard Boxes, Crystal Wine Glasses
programme.desc: Learn how to goalie pads, lapel pins, cardboard boxes, and crystal wine glasses are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: LED Tubes, Chocolate Peanut Butter Bars, and Robotic Medication Dispensers
programme.desc: Featured: LED tubes; chocolate peanut butter bars; robotic medication dispensers.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Long-Distance Murder
programme.desc: Freddie Freeman's loved ones say he may be many things: a lady's man, a hustler, a cult leader --but one thing they insist he's not is a cold-blooded killer. Chris and Melissa reopen his case and find a trail of blood, politics, and wild accusations.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Jonestown Massacre
programme.desc: In the late 50's Jim Jones founded the People's Temple focused on helping those in need. By 1975 he was setting up what was supposed to be a utopia known as Jonestown. But utopia quickly turned into a hell as Jones spiraled deeper into his own paranoia.

programme.title: Kansas Cult Killer
programme.desc: When tragic events strike a small Kansas community over and over again, a cunning detective wants to know if they are just a series of horrible coincidences, or something more sinister.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Affair
programme.desc: After one partner in a marriage has an affair, the wife says she's moving forward. But with hidden back accounts, DNA testing kits and a gun, the woman is becoming unhinged. A deadly act of revenge leaves just one person to tell the tale.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: The Disappearance
programme.desc: In the fall of 2019, a boy and his stepsister go missing. Grandparents Larry and Kay Woodcock desperately try to find out what happened to them and why.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: Into the Past
programme.desc: 7-year-old JJ Vallow and 17-year-old Tylee Ryan have been missing for months. Their mother Lori Vallow defies a court order to appear in Idaho with her children. And JJ's grandparents, Larry and Kay Woodcock, embark on a desperate search for answers.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: End Times
programme.desc: Lori Vallow is extradited from Hawaii to Rexburg, Idaho to face charges of deserting her missing children, JJ and Tylee. Kay and Larry continue to search for answers and try to remain hopeful, but in the summer of 2020, the case takes a tragic turn.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: The Disappearance
programme.desc: In the fall of 2019, a boy and his stepsister go missing. Grandparents Larry and Kay Woodcock desperately try to find out what happened to them and why.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: Into the Past
programme.desc: 7-year-old JJ Vallow and 17-year-old Tylee Ryan have been missing for months. Their mother Lori Vallow defies a court order to appear in Idaho with her children. And JJ's grandparents, Larry and Kay Woodcock, embark on a desperate search for answers.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: End Times
programme.desc: Lori Vallow is extradited from Hawaii to Rexburg, Idaho to face charges of deserting her missing children, JJ and Tylee. Kay and Larry continue to search for answers and try to remain hopeful, but in the summer of 2020, the case takes a tragic turn.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Nose Job Murder
programme.desc: A young lawyer fails to show up for a blind date. He's been shot to death in his apartment. And another woman freely admits she pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide City: Pine Hill Massacre
programme.desc: When Bill and Catherine Stuart are executed in their home along with their three-year-old daughter, police look to the surviving daughter Miriam for clues. Her description of the killer leads detectives deep into Philadelphia's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Homicide City: Danger Comes Home
programme.desc: When 78-year-old, George Volz's family finds him hogtied and decomposing in his Philly row house, police turn to the neighborhood for help.

programme.title: American Cartel: Shots Fired
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Burbank, the murder of a police officer sparks an unprecedented manhunt and reveals clues that a local street gang might be connected to Mexico's most dangerous drug cartels.

programme.title: American Cartel: The Ghost
programme.desc: As the manhunt intensifies, the realization grows that the Vineland Boyz gang is more violent, more sophisticated, and stealthier than anyone had previously imagined. Decisions are made that will change the face of law enforcement forever.

programme.title: American Cartel: The Devil Next Door
programme.desc: What began as the search to find Officer Matt Pavelka's killer quickly reveals a web of narcotics and violence that stretches across America, has infiltrated local government, and whose roots run all the way to El Chapo Guzman's Sinaloa Cartel.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Cover the Camera and I'll Talk
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in Virginia's Isle of Wight County discovers a double homicide involving an 80-year-old disabled grandmother. An undercover informant, a hidden handgun, and an unusual confession all lead to convictions in this cold-blooded crime.

programme.title: See No Evil: Four and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Larry Howse is a dedicated father of two sons. But in August 2013, Larry is found shot dead in his apartment's parking garage in Tacoma, Washington. Police have little to go on until a security camera reveals grainy footage of two mystery assailants.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A series of bizarre 911 calls come in to police in two cities from a serial killer confessing his crimes. The man becomes known as the Weepy Voiced Killer, due to his strange, whining voice--and many young women will fall before he can be stopped.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Body in the Glades
programme.desc: 42-year-old Miami mother Raquel Calderin vanishes without a trace on her way home from work in 2012. The investigation will lead detectives deep into a disturbing family picture, and the truth will haunt them for years to come.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Rage in Rose City
programme.desc: A home invasion turns deadly with the near decapitation of a young man. Portland homicide detectives can't rule out the victim's best friend and girlfriend as suspects, until several other suspects come to light in a case of personal and brutal overkill.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Ring of Truth
programme.desc: Demetra Smith is living in marital bliss with her new husband, but her happiness is cut short when her stepdaughter finds her shot execution style in her bed. Nicole Redlinger and the elite detectives at Atlanta Homicide set out to find her killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught Via Email
programme.desc: When Edward Roberson and two fellow inmates went to the showers, they didn't come back. Breaking out, the three scaled the fences and made a run for it. Roberson has escaped and now has stolen guns, in a stolen car running for his life.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker
programme.desc: Randall Zandstra shot his ex-wife's boyfriend and got 12 years in jail. Due to a technicality, there was a retrial. Zandstra fled, ran to Vegas, winning big in poker and running mail fraud. Authorities finally track him down and he is now in a NJ prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store

programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Hearst vs. Pulitzer
programme.desc: In the late 1890s when William Randolph Hearst challenges the king of newspaper publishing Joseph Pulitzer in a high stakes circulation war, they change publishing forever by stopping at nothing to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Young Family Hopes for Fixer in Older Neighborhood
programme.desc: Kimberly and Blake Batson are first time homebuyers looking for a fixer in Western Hills, Texas to settle down in.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Three Generations, One Fixer
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take Angela and Yanett Silva on a tour through three houses in the small town of Lorena, Texas. Yanett left Venezuela to offer her children a better life.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Country Life Attracts Couple to Small Town Texas
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take Deanna and Paul King on a tour through three houses in the small town of Hubbard, Texas.

programme.title: The Courage to Run with Chip Gaines and Gabe Grunewald
programme.desc: Chip Gaines has a chance meeting with Gabe Grunewald, a professional runner and cancer survivor, in New York's Central Park. Together, they set out to train for a marathon and find a friendship along the way that alters Chip's perspective forever.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: After Recent Adoption, Family Finds Space to Thrive
programme.desc: Keith and Annabeth recently adopted two girls and are hoping to find a house in an area where their family can have space to grow and enjoy the outdoors. Their all-in budget is $175,000 and with Chip and Jo's help, they hope to find a 3-4 bedroom house.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Tight Budgets and Big Dreams
programme.desc: After being away from Waco for six years, Will and Lauren return to raise their two daughters in the house of their dreams. Recruiting Chip and Joanna to create their dream home, and with a budget of $300,000, they embark on a tour of area homes.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Second Chance at a Country Home
programme.desc: After years of living near downtown Waco, Texas, Jordan and Rachel dream of moving to the country with their three kids. After their contract falls through on another property, the couple enlists the help of Chip and Joanna in hopes of a second chance.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 2 Bathrooms, No Bedroom
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Very Scary Camp
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Preserving a Passion That's 'In-Tents'
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Modern Mansion Makeover
programme.desc: The builders give a modern mansion a complete log cabin makeover. They use log skins and a stacked log entryway. The pressure's on as the home will be the centerpiece of an entire log cabin community. Mark also tours a restored pioneer cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Honey Hole
programme.desc: Mark needs a lot of inventory in a hurry so he buys three cabins. It's a fast-paced triple takedown full of suspense, strategy and big crashes. The guys are still able to discover family stories that give these logs history and meaning.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaineer Volunteers
programme.desc: Mark donates a timber frame to his alma mater, West Virginia University, as the latest addition to their pioneer heritage center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Pieces of the Past
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys salvage every last good log they can from an old double-pen barn in Pennsylvania so the logs can be reused to build a guesthouse in upstate New York.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Wedding
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders get ready for a farm wedding by building a barnwood dance floor, a timber-frame photo booth and an incredible handcrafted wedding arbor.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Dough Also Rises
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" a classic biscuit show featuring his grandmother, with an entirely new take on the classic quick bread.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Choux Shine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally turns this old show about pate a choux into what it always should have been: an episode about chocolate eclairs. That means a new pastry cream and a chocolate glaze.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Flay vs. Smith
programme.desc: Canadian TV personality and chef, Michael Smith, enters Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Bobby Flay. Smith prides himself on his organic and local produce and doesn't disappoint by bringing that to Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Becker

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Yagihashi

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Minneapolis for breakfast, lunch, a snack and dinner! Join him on this sweet and savory ride in his search for some of best deals on the best meals in Minneapolis!

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Austin
programme.desc: Ali reveal the best meals that Austin has to offer in a sweet and savory stop that includes: migas tacos at a popular roadside stop, authentic Texas barbecue, a buttery journey in baking and a Bayou experience straight from MawMaw's recipe book.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Flavors Of Cincinnati
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Cincinnati for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mo-Town, Mo-Food

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Noshin' In Nawlins
programme.desc: Ali Khan finds the best meal deals in New Orleans.

programme.title: Fire Masters: A Blaze of Glory
programme.desc: The flames fly as three chefs enter the Fire Masters Arena. Competitors put heart and "sole" on their plates in the Crossfire Round, and, in the Feast of Fire, it's a delicious farm-to-table celebration of harvest abundance.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England
programme.desc: We're in New England, the birthplace of the American Revolution, for some of our favourite food. We sample Boston cream pie, sticky buns, and Szechuan sliced fish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Mexico
programme.desc: The frontier spirit can still be found in New Mexico even when it comes to the food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Chicago's Cutting Edge
programme.desc: Andrew explores the driving forces behind the cutting edge food scene in Chicago. From exotic ingredients to innovative techniques, food suppliers in the Windy City are pushing the limits.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lyon
programme.desc: Andrew explores the legendary and timeless cuisine of Lyon, France.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Santa Monica
programme.desc: Andrew dives in to the laid-back eats of Santa Monica, California. Boasting miles of coastline, Santa Monica is home to spicy seafood soup, Chinese chicken salad, Tsukemen and many other dishes any seafood lover could want.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lancaster County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern celebrates Lancaster County, PA, where farm-to-table dining isn't a trend - it's tradition! Local favorites include pork and sauerkraut, soft pretzels, scrapple, sticky buns and shoofly pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Street Foods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the street food being fried, skewered or sandwiched around the world, from smoked sausages in Chicago and fish tacos in Baja, Mexico, to pani-puri in India and chimney cakes in Budapest.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Better Off Wed
programme.desc: The kids learn that Dr. Colosso ruined their parents' wedding years earlier, and want to recreate Hank and Barb's dream day as their anniversary gift.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Parks and T-Rex
programme.desc: Preoccupied with Z-Force training, Phoebe and Max learn that they've forgotten special family events. Wanting to make it up, Phoebe plans a family fun day, but when things go awry, she stops at nothing to make it the best day ever.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Winning Attitude
programme.desc: Izzy is determined to win a big race with the help of her Special Olympics athlete cousin, Lily. After Lily misses a training session and Izzy rejects more help, her sportsmanship is put to the test.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Unexpected Guest
programme.desc: A familiar face arrives on Earth and Zayto dismisses his quest as a distraction. After he saves the Rangers from a powerful Sporix Beast, Zayto realizes an important lesson.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!
programme.desc: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Saving Face/ Matters of the Kart
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid are determined to find out if the new building tenant is their favorite wrestler – La Tormenta.

programme.title: The Loud House: Washed Up/ Lucha Fever With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: The Louds rent a boat for a relaxing day trip on the lake, but the family ends up marooned on a desert island.

programme.title: The Loud House: Dance Dance Resolution/ A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Lincoln's sisters accidentally land him four dates for the Sadie Hawkins dance at school. When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: The Loud House: House Music/ A Novel Idea
programme.desc: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Crying Dame/ Anti Social
programme.desc: To get Lily to stop crying the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic but it quickly drives them crazy. Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show him how great they are.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Pictures of Boo
programme.desc: In need of shelter from a storm and desperately seeking sleep, the group of questers are welcomed into a mysterious house by a strange Colonel.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm. Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Retires/ Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Land/ The Camping Episode
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs builds a children's theme park; Pat and SpongeBob camp in the backyard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go
programme.desc: Gary goes crazy over the new snail treats SpongeBob brought home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ Suds
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his friends' dreams; Bob musters the courage to visit the doctor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: The group must pass through the ominous Swamp of Fears.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: My Sharon-Ah
programme.desc: Brendar faces off against a Royal Order rival, but the result casts doubt about her ability to complete her ultimate quest.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Parent Just Don’t Understand
programme.desc: Evan is forced to return to his parents’ house to secure Trolls Passage on the group’s journey, but it won’t be easy since he already burned that bridge.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: When Dragons Cry
programme.desc: To get the dragon’s tears needed for Axe, the group must first visit a magical marketplace, where Stacey’s meeting with a witch finally reveals Brendar’s complicated backstory.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Mapmaker, Mapmaker, Make Me a Map
programme.desc: In need of a unique custom map for their next quest, Brendar and the group attempt to wine and dine the only map maker in Gothmoria capable of creating the map they need.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Ice Ice Baby
programme.desc: After getting caught in a snowstorm, Evan accidentally damages the snow ogre meant to protect local villagers and is made to stand trial for his crime.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Pictures of Boo
programme.desc: In need of shelter from a storm and desperately seeking sleep, the group of questers are welcomed into a mysterious house by a strange Colonel.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: Danger Force: Villains' Night
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Indestructible Henry
programme.desc: When Kid Danger is almost badly injured on a mission, Henry decides to go through the densitizer and become indestructible like Captain Man. Unfortunately things don't turn out quite the way Henry hopes they will.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger
programme.desc: Kid Danger, Captain Man and their crew take their crime fighting skills on fun adventures.

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Hour of Power
programme.desc: When Drex, a dangerous criminal who just escaped from Swellview prison, embarrasses Kid Danger and traps Captain Man in a helmet, Kid Danger must use the help of Schwoz to gain a superpower and defeat Drex.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: Danger Force: Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: Danger Force: Lil' Dynomite
programme.desc: When Danger Force accidentally forgets about plans they have with Ray, he surprises them with a brand new member of the team to make them jealous.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Hour of Power
programme.desc: When Drex, a dangerous criminal who just escaped from Swellview prison, embarrasses Kid Danger and traps Captain Man in a helmet, Kid Danger must use the help of Schwoz to gain a superpower and defeat Drex.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lake Nose Monster
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb set out to rescue the mysterious Lake Nose monster from the effects of living in a zinc-less lake.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Little Frogtown/ Hopping Mall
programme.desc: Hop Pop investigates the disappearance of an old friend and the shadowy crime syndicate he suspects are behind it. Hop Pop takes the kids to a Newtopian shopping mall to buy souvenirs, and Anne will do anything to get the perfect gift for her mom.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part One
programme.desc: Ezra inadvertently messes up one of Kanan's missions and is forced to escape with the crew of the Ghost in order to survive. The boys find out Kanan and his team are freedom fighters, and their next assignment is freeing Wookie prisoners.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part Two
programme.desc: During his attempt to save the team from the Imperial trap, Ezra is captured by Agent Kallus. The rebels rescue the kid and set off on their original mission: to liberate the Wookiees destined for a terrible fate.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Droids of Distress
programme.desc: The rebels intercept a shipment of powerful weapons intended for the Empire, but the sale of the weapons doesn’t go according to plan when a frightened C-3PO calls the authorities.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Fighter Flight
programme.desc: Hera sends Ezra and Zeb into the city on a simple errand, but in a foolhardy stunt, the boys steal a TIE fighter instead. They wind up using the captured ship to free innocent prisoners en route to a labor camp.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Rise of the Old Masters
programme.desc: An underground broadcast reveals that the Empire is holding a Jedi Master prisoner. In a bold rescue attempt the crew of the Ghost voyages to the bleak prison world of Stygeon Prime only to fall into a trap engineered by the Inquisitor.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Breaking Ranks
programme.desc: Ezra infiltrates Lothal's Academy for Young Imperials, where the Empire identifies Force-sensitive children and indoctrinates the youths of Lothal into joining their ranks. With the help of cadet Zare Leonis, he gets vital information for the rebels.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred's Bro-Tillion
programme.desc: When supervillain Baron Von Steamer crashes Fred's Bro-Tillion, the Big Hero 6 team springs into action.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Issue 188
programme.desc: As Hiro tries to find a way to connect to classmate Karmi, Go Go and Fred dive deep into comic book mythology to defeat High Voltage, a mother-daughter supervillain duo.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: The Great Revolution! Legend Festival!
programme.desc: It’s time to get hyped! With the curtains finally open on the Legend Festival, Blading legends and challengers alike are gathered for the ultimate showdown. The first stage: battle royale!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Hyuga and Lain vs Hikaru and Aiger!
programme.desc: Participants in the Legend Festival are off to compete in the second stage! Next up is a series of team battles starting with Hyuga and Lain taking on Hikaru and Aiger. Meanwhile, Valt, Free, Rantaro, and Silas prep for their own battle.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sipping With the Enemy/ Tri-State Treasure: Boot of Secrets
programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Vince Takes a Bath

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the ATM
programme.desc: Max decides to break-up with Deke now that she knows about his wealthy background.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sheryl Underwood, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Russell Peters.

programme.title: Black-ish: Who's Afraid of the Big Black Man
programme.desc: After a situation arises at work, Dre's views are confronted regarding how black people are perceived now versus when he grew up. He wants to be more open-minded about being a part of his community, so he joins the Homeowners' Association.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Real World
programme.desc: When Bow reconnects with her college friends on Facebook, she invites them over for an elaborate dinner party and tries to impress them. On the night of the party, Dre ends up learning a lot of new information about Bow's past.

programme.title: Charmed: No Hablo Brujeria
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones are visited by a mysterious stranger looking for answers. Macy helps Jordan face down the past.

programme.title: Dynasty: New Hopes, New Beginnings
programme.desc: As Fallon works to repair her image, she leaves Alexis and Adam in her wake. Jeff and Dominique have a true heart-to-heart as Jeff delivers some unexpected news. Culhane turns to Sam for help and Sam gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Raincoats
programme.desc: Kramer's plans to sell raincoats backfire when a shipment is delayed.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Mom and Pop Store
programme.desc: A salesman convinces George to buy a car that used to belong to Jon Voight. Elaine wins tickets for Mr. Pitt to participate in Macy's Thanksgiving Day parade. Kramer takes Jerry's sneakers to a shoe-repair business.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Corey's Been Dead for An Hour
programme.desc: Charlie becomes annoyed with Alan for constantly sponging off him and promising to cover the tab 'next time.' When Alan tries to leave Charlie the cheque for dinner with two women, Charlie tries to beat him at his own game.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Oh Look! Al-Qaeda!
programme.desc: Jake is pressured to make a decision about his future.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Schmoopie's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Mother and son have a bonding experience when Beverly buys a bicycle for Adam just like the one from 'Pee Wee's Big Adventure,' while Barry and Erica turn Murray's furniture store into an after-hours lounge for college students.

programme.title: Mom: Bad Hand and British Royalty
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie have their hands full when Adam's hard-partying friends come for a visit.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mike and the Mechanics
programme.desc: To snap Eve out of her funk of not getting into West Point Academy, Mike hopes that taking her to Outdoor Man will show her different career options. But both Mike and Vanessa are taken aback by the unexpected influence that car mechanic Joe has on her.
